title: postapiauthregisterwithvaliddata
description: Test user registration with valid email and password to ensure 201 Created response with userId and basic profile is returned.

title: postapiauthregisterwithexistingemail
description: Test user registration with an email that already exists to verify 409 Conflict response with error message 'email already in use'.

title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Test user login with valid credentials to receive 200 OK with accessToken, refreshToken, and expiresIn.

title: postapiauthloginwithinvalidcredentials
description: Test user login with invalid credentials to ensure 401 Unauthorized response with 'invalid credentials' error message.

title: postapiauthrefreshwithvalidrefreshtoken
description: Test refreshing access token using a valid refreshToken to receive 200 OK with new accessToken and refreshToken.

title: postapiauthrefreshwithexpiredorrevokedtoken
description: Test refreshing access token with expired or revoked refreshToken to verify 401 Unauthorized or 400 Bad Request indicating invalid refresh token.

title: postapiauthlogoutwithvalidrefreshtoken
description: Test logout endpoint with valid refreshToken to confirm 200 OK response indicating token revoked.

title: postapiauthlogoutwithoutrefreshtoken
description: Test logout endpoint without providing refreshToken to ensure 401 Unauthorized response.
